course_description.overview: Mass-participation cycling event on closed roads through Singapore's landmarks including Benjamin Sheares Bridge, Central Business District, Singapore Flyer, West Coast Highway, and Port of Singapore, finishing at National Stadium.

key_segments.name: Benjamin Sheares Bridge
key_segments.description: Iconic bridge with scenic city views on closed roads.

key_segments.name: Central Business District
key_segments.description: Urban ride past skyscrapers and key landmarks.

key_segments.name: Singapore Flyer and Gardens by the Bay
key_segments.description: Picturesque sections with waterfront and landmark views.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Flat, beginner-friendly urban course with no significant climbs, focused on scenic mass ride rather than challenge.

logistics.getting_there: Event at Singapore Sports Hub; arrive 45-60 minutes before flag-off. Public transport recommended due to road closures.
logistics.accommodation: Hotels near Singapore Sports Hub or Orchard Road; staycation prizes available via lucky draws.
logistics.registration_details: Opens February 6, 2026 at 12 noon via www.ocbccycle.com; early bird discounts >30% until February 8; fees vary by category (e.g., Brompton Championship launch special S$75.65).
logistics.bike_logistics: Free bike rentals available (limited); all foldies welcome for Foldie Ride; Brompton-specific for championship.
logistics.local_considerations: Hot, humid tropical climate; closed roads sanctioned by authorities; family-friendly with kids ride; charity component in fees.

final_verdict.one_liner: Singapore's premier mass cycling celebration on closed roads with fun vibes and landmarks.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Beginners, families, foldie enthusiasts, and casual riders seeking a safe, scenic group ride.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes for locals and regional cyclists; excellent value, atmosphere, and accessibility.
pro_tips: Register early for discounts and prizes like SIA tickets.
Opt for Sportive or Foldie 40km for prime experience.
Arrive early for pen closure; hydrate for humidity.
Bring funky attire for Brompton Championship fun.
